entity.label: Philetus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Amiable, with Hymenaeus, at Ephesus, said that the “resurrection was past already” (2 Tim. 2:17, 18). This was a Gnostic heresy held by the Nicolaitanes.

nodes.label: Philetus
nodes.description: Amiable, with Hymenaeus, at Ephesus, said that the “resurrection was past already” (2 Tim. 2:17, 18). This was a Gnostic heresy held by the Nicolaitanes.

verses.text: And their word will eat as doth a canker: of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus;
